metadata.description: Production-grade standards for Claude Code — Flutter, API (NestJS + Prisma), Web (Next.js), Mobile-universal. Install a pack, Claude applies the standards. No CLAUDE.md edits.

plugins.name: flutter-standards
plugins.description: Flutter pack — 10 auto-invoke standards (craft, engineering, widgets, data, testing, a11y, perf, forms, observability, production-readiness with smart Detect→Check→Suggest audits). Audit commands (pre-ship, premium-check, verify-screens) are thin wrappers that delegate iteration to core-standards:verify-changes; audit-a11y-patterns is a fast regex sweep; find-hardcoded, find-duplicates, and scaffolds remain standalone.

plugins.name: mobile-standards
plugins.description: Mobile-universal pack — craft quality (iOS Liquid Glass, Material You, tonal elevation, haptic timing), production readiness, forms, observability, testing, premium-signals (Spring animation values, bottom-sheet detents, scroll-linked animation). Applies to Flutter, React Native, SwiftUI, Jetpack Compose. Auto-invoked by description triggers.

plugins.name: api-standards
plugins.description: API pack — NestJS + Prisma. Auto-invoke: nestjs + code-quality standards; cross-stack-contracts (active when craft.json stacks has 2+ entries: unified error shape, cursor pagination, Bearer header, versioned routes, OpenAPI spec); websockets (conditional on socket.io/ws usage: connection auth, backoff reconnect, event enum, schema versioning). Sync-migrate workflow.

plugins.name: web-standards
plugins.description: Web pack — Next.js + Tailwind + shadcn. Auto-invoke: nextjs + production-readiness (§R1–§R10) + craft-guide (§1–§15 rule IDs); premium-signals (market-sourced precise values — 2-layer shadow formula, OKLCH dark gray scale, Linear easing, tabular-nums, display tracking); i18n (conditional on next-i18next/react-i18next or locales/ dir: t() coverage, plural rules, RTL, locale routing). Audit commands delegate to core-standards:verify-changes. extract-tokens writes token source of truth.

plugins.name: core-hooks
plugins.description: Hooks-only plugin. SessionStart surfaces plugin-hook mechanics and (opt-in) a mandatory-skills preamble. PreToolUse blocks edits to secrets, dangerous shell, raw design values in token-managed projects, cold Task/Agent spawns below warmth threshold, and — when enforcement mode is opted in via .claude/enforcement.json — a per-pack rule registry. Stop hook blocks turn-end until each mandatory pack's gate has passed. Configurable via allowed_files and allowed_commands in .claude/enforcement.json.

plugins.name: core-standards
plugins.description: Cross-stack engine and universal skills. Engine skill (verify-changes) owns orchestration — plan, delegate, cross-check, report. Universal skills: principles, planning (structured plan block with measurable deliverables + craft.json auto-generation), rules (§1 Security ALWAYS-MANDATORY, §2–§5 universal), verification (4-tier detection: ALWAYS/PROJECT/TASK-SCOPED/FLAGGED, adversarial verifier mindset, restart-after-fix), auth-flows (conditional on craft.json features.auth: JWT lifecycle, refresh rotation, PKCE, guard composition), craft-config (craft.json schema + auto-generation), agents, mcp-integration, docs-sync, subagent-brief.
